exploration_notes: Wrote comprehensive unit tests in value_test.go covering the value package. The test file contains 11 test functions with 3 mock types. Tests cover: DefaultContext (table-driven with 3 subtests), Transformer round-trip, prefix mismatch errors, empty-prefix identity transformer, stale detection (table-driven with 4 subtests), nil error default message, overlapping prefix fanout logic (table-driven with 3 subtests), empty data edge case, write error propagation, identity fallthrough on error, data
